title: Review: code review findings from pre-merge audit
notes:
Maintainer risk: MEDIUM — one P0 correctness bug (ECDSA signature format inconsistency across SigningBackend impls) will generate immediate user reports when switching between aws-kms and local-signing/pkcs11. Everything else is documentation quality and semantic API issues.
Confidence: 85% chance of no additional missed bugs in the non-vault backends. Uncertainty driven by: (1) Bitwarden and GCP-SM have no integration tests so their API shape assumptions could be wrong; (2) the ECDSA format issue shows signing-path tests only check is_empty(), not correctness or cross-backend consistency. Would raise confidence if: aws-kms integration test included round-trip verification with p256::ecdsa to confirm signature format, and bitwarden had a live integration test.
